---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem would this solve? What are you trying to do today that's hard?

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you set them aside.

## Scope / impact

- Component(s): backend / frontend / agent / deploy
- Does it preserve graceful degradation (works without keys)? Yes / No / N/A

## Additional context

Links, mockups, or references. See [ROADMAP.md](../../ROADMAP.md) for planned
direction.
